title: tournefortia miquelii
intro: Tournefortia miquelii is a species of flowering plant in the bignonia family, native to the Philippines. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Tournefortia miquelii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
